parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $('Skip If Sent').item.json.user_id }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $('Skip If Sent').item.json.client_id }}",
  "channel": "email",
  "type": "{{ $('Skip If Sent').item.json.type_log }}",
  "subject": "{{ $('Skip If Sent').item.json.subject }}",
  "content": "{{ $json.content ? $json.content[0].text : 'Relance envoyee' }}",
  "sent_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "status": "sent"
}
